name: KS_VARLIKLAR_RAPORU_KUMULATIF_2024
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[KS_VARLIKLAR_RAPORU_KUMULATIF_2024] AS
--SELECT '123' FIRMA,'HESAP DIŞI' GRUP , 'VERGİ BORÇLARI' VARLIKLAR, EMUHACC.CODE , EMUHACC.DEFINITION_ DEFINITION_ ,  EMUHACC.LOGICALREF CARDREF , 0 TOTTYP  , ISNULL(CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE,'TL') CURCODE , 
--SUM(CASE WHEN DEBIT = 0 THEN -1 WHEN CREDIT = 0 THEN 1 END * ROUND((EMFLINE.TRNET),2)) BAKIYE,
--ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1) CURRATE  

--FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE EMFLINE WITH(NOLOCK)  
--INNER JOIN LG_123_EMUHACC EMUHACC WITH(NOLOCK) ON EMUHACC.LOGICALREF = EMFLINE.ACCOUNTREF
--LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CURRENCYLIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON (EMFLINE.TRCURR  =  CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE) AND (CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = 123)
--LEFT JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_123 EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())

--WHERE EMFLINE.CANCELLED = 0
--AND (EMUHACC.CODE LIKE '360%' OR EMUHACC.CODE LIKE '361%')
--GROUP BY EMUHACC.CODE , EMUHACC.DEFINITION_  ,  EMUHACC.LOGICALREF  , CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE , EXCHANGE.RATES1  

--UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP ,'KASA BAKİYE' VARLIKLAR ,KSCARD.CODE , KSCARD.NAME DEFINITION_ ,  CASHTOT.CARDREF , CASHTOT.TOTTYPE TOTTYP  , ISNULL(CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE,'TL') CURCODE , 
ROUND(SUM(CASHTOT.DEBIT) ,2) - ROUND(SUM(CASHTOT.CREDIT),2) BAKIYE , ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1) CURRATE  

FROM LG_123_01_CSHTOTS CASHTOT WITH(NOLOCK) 
INNER JOIN LG_123_KSCARD KSCARD WITH(NOLOCK) ON CASHTOT.CARDREF = KSCARD.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CURRENCYLIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON KSCARD.CCURRENCY = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = 123
LEFT JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_123 EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())

WHERE (CASHTOT.CARDREF = 1) AND (CASHTOT.TOTTYPE = 1) 

GROUP BY KSCARD.CODE , KSCARD.NAME ,  CASHTOT.CARDREF , CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE , EXCHANGE.RATES1 , CASHTOT.TOTTYPE

UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP ,'ARABA STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, MAX(ITEMS.CARDTYPE)  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) * 
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.STGRPCODE = 'ARABA' AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0  AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE NOT IN ( 4 )
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP ,'GEBZE STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0))  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) * 
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = 2 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.CYPHCODE <> 'KARAVAN' AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> 'ARABA' AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0  AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE NOT IN ( 4 )
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF 
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

UNION ALL


SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP ,'SHOWROOM STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0))  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) * 
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = 1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.CYPHCODE <> 'KARAVAN' AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> 'ARABA' AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0 AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE NOT IN ( 4 )
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF 
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP ,'ÜRETİM STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0))  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,
 
SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) *
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO IN (3,4,5,11,13,15) AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.CYPHCODE <> 'KARAVAN' AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> 'ARABA' AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0 AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE NOT IN ( 4 )
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

UNION ALL


SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP ,'E Ticaret STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0))  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) * 
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = 14 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.CYPHCODE <> 'KARAVAN' AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> 'ARABA' AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0 AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE NOT IN ( 4 )
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF 
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

--UNION ALL

--SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP ,'MONTAJ STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0))  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,
 
--SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) *

--(CAST(CAST(
--		ISNULL
--		(CASE 
--			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
--				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
--			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
--		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
--ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
--1 CURRATE

--FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
--LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = 5 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
--WHERE ITEMS.CYPHCODE <> 'KARAVAN' AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> 'ARABA' AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0  AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE NOT IN ( 4 )
--GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
--HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

SELECT '123' FIRMA,'DEĞERLER' GRUP, 'DEMİRBAŞLAR' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, MAX(ITEMS.CARDTYPE)  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(FAREGIST.INVALUE,0))),2) AS BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM
	LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_FAREGIST FAREGIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=FAREGIST.CRDREF 
	--LEFT OUTER JOIN [TIGER3]..LG_123_FAYEAR FAYEAR WITH(NOLOCK) ON FAREGIST.LOGICALREF=FAYEAR.FREGREF
WHERE
	ITEMS.CODE<>'ÿ'
	AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE=4
	AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0
	AND STGRPCODE = ''
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
HAVING ISNULL((SELECT SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()),0) > -1

UNION ALL


SELECT '123' FIRMA,ITEMS.SPECODE4 GRUP, ITEMS.STGRPCODE VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, MAX(ITEMS.CARDTYPE)  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(FAREGIST.INVALUE,0))),2) AS BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM
	[TIGER3]..LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN [TIGER3]..LG_123_FAREGIST FAREGIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=FAREGIST.CRDREF 
	--LEFT OUTER JOIN [TIGER3]..LG_123_FAYEAR FAYEAR WITH(NOLOCK) ON FAREGIST.LOGICALREF=FAYEAR.FREGREF
WHERE
	ITEMS.CODE<>'ÿ'
	AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE=4
	AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0
	AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> ''
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF,ITEMS.STGRPCODE,ITEMS.SPECODE4
HAVING ISNULL((SELECT SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()),0) > -1


UNION ALL
SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'BORÇLAR' GRUP , 'TEDARİKÇİ BORÇ' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , 

SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (

SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'

FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=123 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '320%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE  ) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) < 0

UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'HESAP DIŞI' GRUP ,'VERİLEN AVANSLAR' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE ,

SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=123 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '320%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE ) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ 
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'BORÇLAR' GRUP , 'ALINAN AVANS' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , 

SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=123 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '120%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE ) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ 
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) < 0

UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP, 'CARİ ALACAKLAR' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE ,

SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=123 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '120%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE  ) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ 
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP ,'BANKA BAKİYE' VARLIKLAR, BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  123 CARDREF , BNCARD.LOGICALREF TOTTYP  , 
                    
    (CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' ELSE L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE END) AS CURCODE,

	SUM((CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2)
    * - 1 ELSE ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2) END)) AS BAKIYE,

	MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1)) CURRATE  

FROM dbo.LG_123_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_123_BNCARD AS BNCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BANKREF = BNCARD.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_123_BANKACC AS BANKACC WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BNACCREF = BANKACC.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_123_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_123_BANKACC AS BANKACC1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFICHE.BNACCOUNTREF = BANKACC1.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '123' LEFT OUTER JOIN
	dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
WHERE BNFLINE.CANCELLED = 0 
AND BANKACC.CARDTYPE IN (1,3)
GROUP BY  BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  BANKACC.LOGICALREF  , BNCARD.LOGICALREF , BNFLINE.TRCURR , L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE 

UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'BORÇLAR' GRUP ,'TOPLAM KREDİ BORÇ' VARLIKLAR, BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  123 CARDREF , BNCARD.LOGICALREF TOTTYP  ,             
(CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' ELSE L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE END) AS CURCODE,

SUM((CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2)
* - 1 ELSE ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2) END)) AS BAKIYE,
MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1)) CURRATE  

FROM         dbo.LG_123_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_BNCARD AS BNCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BANKREF = BNCARD.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_BANKACC AS BANKACC WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BNACCREF = BANKACC.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_BANKACC AS BANKACC1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFICHE.BNACCOUNTREF = BANKACC1.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '123' LEFT OUTER JOIN
					  dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
WHERE BNFLINE.CANCELLED = 0 
AND BANKACC.CARDTYPE IN (2)
AND BANKACC.LOGICALREF NOT IN (SELECT BNCRACCREF FROM LG_123_BNCREDITCARD WITH(NOLOCK))
GROUP BY  BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  BANKACC.LOGICALREF  , BNCARD.LOGICALREF , BNFLINE.TRCURR , L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE 


UNION ALL

SELECT '123' FIRMA, 'BORÇLAR' GRUP ,'TOPLAM KREDİ BORÇ' VARLIKLAR, BANKACC_CR.CODE , BANKACC_CR.DEFINITION_ ,
'123' CARDREF, 1 TOTTYP, (CASE WHEN CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE IS NULL THEN 'TL' ELSE CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE END) AS CURCODE,
SUM(BNCRTRANS.TOTAL * -1) 'BAKIYE', MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1)) CURRATE 
FROM LG_123_BNCREPAYTR BNCRTRANS WITH(NOLOCK)  
INNER JOIN LG_123_BNCREDITCARD BNCREDITCARD WITH(NOLOCK) ON BNCRTRANS.CREDITREF = BNCREDITCARD.LOGICALREF

	SUM((CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2)

    dbo.LG_223_BNCARD AS BNCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BANKREF = BNCARD.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_223_BANKACC AS BANKACC WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BNACCREF = BANKACC.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_223_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_223_BANKACC AS BANKACC1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFICHE.BNACCOUNTREF = BANKACC1.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '223' LEFT OUTER JOIN

SELECT '323' FIRMA, 'VARLIKLAR' GRUP ,'KASA BAKİYE' VARLIKLAR ,KSCARD.CODE , KSCARD.NAME ,  CASHTOT.CARDREF , CASHTOT.TOTTYPE TOTTYP  , ISNULL(CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE,'TL') CURCODE ,

FROM LG_323_01_CSHTOTS CASHTOT WITH(NOLOCK) 
INNER JOIN LG_323_KSCARD KSCARD WITH(NOLOCK) ON CASHTOT.CARDREF = KSCARD.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CURRENCYLIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON KSCARD.CCURRENCY = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = 123
LEFT JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_123 EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())

WHERE (CASHTOT.CARDREF = 1) AND (CASHTOT.TOTTYPE = 1) 

GROUP BY KSCARD.CODE , KSCARD.NAME ,  CASHTOT.CARDREF , CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE , EXCHANGE.RATES1 , CASHTOT.TOTTYPE

UNION ALL

SELECT '323' FIRMA,'VARLIKLAR' GRUP , 'ARABA STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, MAX(ITEMS.CARDTYPE)  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) * 
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_323_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_323_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 (LINENET+DIFFPRICE)/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_323_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_323_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_323_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.STGRPCODE = 'ARABA'
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT '323' FIRMA, 'DEĞERLER' GRUP,'DEMİRBAŞLAR' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, MAX(ITEMS.CARDTYPE)  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(FAREGIST.INVALUE,0))),2) AS BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM
	[TIGER3]..LG_323_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN [TIGER3]..LG_323_FAREGIST FAREGIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=FAREGIST.CRDREF 
	--LEFT OUTER JOIN [TIGER3]..LG_323_FAYEAR FAYEAR WITH(NOLOCK) ON FAREGIST.LOGICALREF=FAYEAR.FREGREF
WHERE
	ITEMS.CODE<>'ÿ'
	AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE=4
	AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0
	AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE = ''

HAVING ISNULL((SELECT SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) FROM LV_323_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()),0) > -1

SELECT '323' FIRMA, 'BORÇLAR' GRUP ,'TEDARİKÇİ BORÇ' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , 

SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (

SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'

FROM LG_323_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_323_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=123 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '320%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE  ) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) < 0

UNION ALL

SELECT '323' FIRMA,'VARLIKLAR' GRUP , 'BANKA BAKİYE' VARLIKLAR, BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  123 CARDREF , BNCARD.LOGICALREF TOTTYP  , 
                    
    (CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' ELSE L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE END) AS CURCODE,

	SUM((CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2)
    * - 1 ELSE ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2) END)) AS BAKIYE,

	MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1)) CURRATE  

FROM dbo.LG_323_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_323_BNCARD AS BNCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BANKREF = BNCARD.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_323_BANKACC AS BANKACC WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BNACCREF = BANKACC.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_323_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.LG_323_BANKACC AS BANKACC1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFICHE.BNACCOUNTREF = BANKACC1.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '323' LEFT OUTER JOIN
	dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
WHERE BNFLINE.CANCELLED = 0 
AND BANKACC.CARDTYPE IN (1,3)
GROUP BY  BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  BANKACC.LOGICALREF  , BNCARD.LOGICALREF , BNFLINE.TRCURR , L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE 

UNION ALL

SELECT '323' FIRMA, 'BORÇLAR' GRUP , 'TOPLAM KREDİ BORÇ' VARLIKLAR, BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  123 CARDREF , BNCARD.LOGICALREF TOTTYP  ,             
(CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' ELSE L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE END) AS CURCODE,

SUM((CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2)
* - 1 ELSE ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2) END)) AS BAKIYE,
MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1)) CURRATE  

FROM         dbo.LG_323_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_323_BNCARD AS BNCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BANKREF = BNCARD.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_323_BANKACC AS BANKACC WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BNACCREF = BANKACC.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_323_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_323_BANKACC AS BANKACC1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFICHE.BNACCOUNTREF = BANKACC1.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '323' LEFT OUTER JOIN
					  dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
WHERE BNFLINE.CANCELLED = 0 
AND BANKACC.CARDTYPE IN (2)
AND BANKACC.LOGICALREF NOT IN (SELECT BNCRACCREF FROM LG_323_BNCREDITCARD WITH(NOLOCK))
GROUP BY  BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  BANKACC.LOGICALREF  , BNCARD.LOGICALREF , BNFLINE.TRCURR , L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE

UNION ALL

SELECT '323' FIRMA, 'BORÇLAR' GRUP ,'TOPLAM KREDİ BORÇ' VARLIKLAR,BANKACC_CR.CODE , BANKACC_CR.DEFINITION_ ,
'323' CARDREF, 1 TOTTYP, (CASE WHEN CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE IS NULL THEN 'TL' ELSE CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE END) AS CURCODE,
SUM(BNCRTRANS.TOTAL * -1) 'BAKIYE', MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1)) CURRATE 
FROM LG_323_BNCREPAYTR BNCRTRANS WITH(NOLOCK)  
INNER JOIN LG_323_BNCREDITCARD BNCREDITCARD WITH(NOLOCK) ON BNCRTRANS.CREDITREF = BNCREDITCARD.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CURRENCYLIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON (BNCREDITCARD.TRCURR  =  CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE) AND (CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = 323)
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_323_BNCARD BNCARD_CR WITH(NOLOCK) ON (BNCARD_CR.LOGICALREF  =  BNCREDITCARD.BNCRREF)
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_323_BANKACC BANKACC_CR WITH(NOLOCK) ON (BANKACC_CR.LOGICALREF  =  BNCREDITCARD.BNCRACCREF)
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_323_BNCREPAYTR BNCRTRANS_RETURN WITH(NOLOCK)  ON BNCRTRANS_RETURN.LOGICALREF <> BNCRTRANS.LOGICALREF AND BNCRTRANS_RETURN.PARENTREF = BNCRTRANS.PARENTREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
WHERE BNCRTRANS.TRANSTYPE = 0
AND BNCREDITCARD.ENDDATE > GETDATE()
AND BNCRTRANS_RETURN.LINEEXP IS NULL
GROUP BY BANKACC_CR.CODE , BANKACC_CR.DEFINITION_ , CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE
